{{Quote|What's good for the Nine Families is good for the Ascendancy.|A [[Unidentified Plikh speaker|Speaker]] for the [[Plikh family]]|<ref name="Chaos Rising" />}}
The '''Nine Ruling Families''',<ref name="Chaos Rising" /> formerly the '''First Ruling Family''' when the [[Stybla family]] ruled the [[Chiss Ascendancy]], the '''Three Ruling Families''',<ref name="Lesser Evil">''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil]]''</ref> the '''Ten Ruling Families''', and at one point having as much as twelve Ruling Families,<ref name="Greater Good">''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good]]''</ref> were an elite group of [[Chiss family|Chiss families]] that led the [[Chiss Ascendancy]] within the [[Unknown Regions]]. The Nine Ruling Families were represented in the Ascendancy's supreme political body, the [[Chiss Syndicure]]. Each of the Ruling Families had a family symbol worn on the [[Chiss uniform|uniforms]] of their [[Ascendancy military]] [[Chiss officer|officers]] and [[cadet]]s.<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

At least some [[Great Families]], who were lower in the political hierarchy, sought to become part of the higher caste. Tribunals of the Syndicure's [[Aristocra (organization)|Aristocra]] typically included representatives from the Ruling Families as well as the Great Families.<ref name="Chaos Rising" /> The [[Xodlak family]] was formerly one of the Ten Ruling Families, but it was demoted to one of the forty Great Families,<ref name="Greater Good" /> leaving only nine.<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

Notably, the number of Ruling Families was not fixed at nine. The [[Chiss]] had historical records of there once being as many as 12 Ruling Families, and legends of there once being only one Ruling Family.<ref name="Greater Good" />

The Ruling Families were allowed to run their own private fleets outside of the [[Chiss Defense Force]] to protect family interests on a planet or family stronghold systems. They could even declare a family emergency to summon family officers and warriors inside the Defense Force to help out in their own private fleet.<ref name="Greater Good" />

==The Ruling Families==
At the time of the [[attack on Csilla]] towards the end of the [[Clone Wars]], the Nine Ruling Families were:
*[[Ufsa family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Irizi family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Dasklo family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Clarr family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Chaf family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Plikh family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Boadil family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Mitth family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />
*[[Obbic family]]<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

Each family saw themselves as the best, leading to a great level of rivalry. The Ufsa and the Irizi were allies, especially in their opposition against the Mitth, who often sided with the Obbic. The Chaf had a slight rivalry with the Mitth but weren't allies of the Irizi either. The Plikh and the Boadil shifted their alliances as they deemed necessary.<ref name="Greater Good" /> The Dasklo and the Clarr were great enemies, almost leading to [[Jixtus's plan|civil war]] when the Clarr warship ''[[Orisson]]'' appeared in a Dasklo controlled system.<ref name="Lesser Evil" />

While some families like the Boadil focused on trade power, other families like the Irizi and the Mitth were more interested in providing the best officers to the military.<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

==Former Ruling Families==
At the time of the [[Nikardun campaigns]] and the [[Jixtus's plan|plot to destroy the Chiss Ascendancy]], former Ruling Families included:
*[[Coduyo family]]<ref name="Greater Good" />
*[[Stybla family]]<ref name="Greater Good" />
*[[Xodlak family]]<ref name="Greater Good" />

==Organization==
===Chiss Family Ranks===
The Nine Ruling Families had five ranks, the [[Blood (rank)|Blood]], the [[Cousin]], the [[Ranking distant]], the [[Trial-born]] and the [[Merit adoptive]].<ref name="Chaos Rising />

===Political Hierarchy===
All the Nine Ruling Families had the same ranks, those being: the [[Patriarch]], the head of the family; the [[Speaker (Chiss Ascendancy)|Speaker]], the chief [[syndic]]; the syndic, the member of the [[Chiss Syndicure|Syndicure]]; the [[patriel]], which handled family affairs on a planetary scale; the [[Councilor (Chiss Ascendancy)|councilor]], which handled family affairs at a local level; and the [[aristocra]], a mid-level member of one of the Nine Ruling Families.<ref name="Chaos Rising />
